final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty skincare brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a three-column hero layout (left: copy column, center: model subject, right: product display column) plus a header bar above and a bottom benefit strip below
Subject: must include all of the following:
  Header: logo wordmark "LUMEA BEAUTY", 5 navigation links, one CTA button
  Center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Right column: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box, 3 floating stat cards
  Bottom: 3 horizontal benefit cards with icons
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy studio or lifestyle backdrop with purple floral accents — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs soft, diffused feminine lighting — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant, with purple flower accents and gold accent details on stat cards
Materials/textures: needs a light, clean digital UI feel — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all of the following text elements verbatim:
  Header nav links: "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"
  Header CTA button: "今すぐ試す"
  Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
  Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
  Feature badges (pill-shaped with small icons): "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
  Bullet points (pink checkmarks): "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
  CTA buttons: "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >"
  Trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Stat cards (floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents): "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Benefit cards (horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons): "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all UI sections in correct spatial order — header top, three-column hero middle, benefit strip bottom; all text elements must be legible and placed in their designated sections
Avoid:
